subject: Re: Generating initial reconstruction after exporting particles
body:
Hi Ricardo,
I think it is currently the only way.
For this reason we currently always extract —3d, too.
Best,
Philipp.
Sent from my iPhone
On 5 Mar 2025, at 17:40, Ricardo Righetto <ricardorighetto@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Hi,
I might be missing something obvious, but I don't see a way of generating an initial average from my particles STAR file when exporting particles from WarpTools using --2d. If using --3d, we can use relion_reconstruct_mpi as before in Windows Warp. Is that the only way?
Thanks in advance!
--
Ricardo Diogo Righetto






--
